title: A Couple of Canines
description: A Couple of Canines is a datapack that adds a few new wolf variants to the game!
body:
![The logo for A Couple of Canines, It has a wolf silhouette on top with what represents it walking and barking.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81d5c74ae75100f5d060b080068b304f86fc0c50.png)

Whether you simply want more fluffy friends, or just some more variety in your world. A Couple of Canines is a datapack that adds a few new wolf variants to vanilla Minecraft to help with that.


## IMPORTANT:
**[The resource pack for A Couple of Canines is required for the textures to show](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/a-couple-of-canines-resources).**


![The wolf variants in an image (from right to left) Varied, Smoky, Masked, Fields, Dusty, Shrub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79e6fd246abf132946d8cc75578d71dbce1c2e7f.png)

## Here is a list of the current wolves and their spawn locations:

- Varied Wolves: Windswept Forest

- Smoky Wolves: Old Growth Birch Forest

- Masked Wolves: Cherry Groves

- Fields Wolves: Plains

- Dusty Wolves: Desert

- Shrub Wolves: Windswept Savanna
